results.title: 'World Cup infiltration plot?’: DHS alleges IRGC operatives tried to enter U.S. under FIFA cover
results.description: U.S. Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin has made an explosive allegation, claiming that Iran attempted to use its 2026 FIFA World Cup delegation to move individuals with direct ties to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) into the United States.

results.title: Lock Upp Season 2 Contestants REVEALED! Harshad, Shivangi ,Dheeraj & More Join the Show
results.description: Lock Upp Season 2 is already creating massive buzz ahead of its June 27, 2026 premiere. Produced by Ekta Kapoor, the reality show returns with a fresh twist, new hosts Farah Khan and Riteish Deshmukh, and a power-packed celebrity lineup.Reportedly, popular TV stars Harshad Chopda, Shivangi Joshi, and Dheeraj Dhoopar are among the confirmed contestants this season. The list also includes Sunita Ahuja, Akanksha Khanna, Akanksha Choudhury, and Madhuri Grover, making this one of the most talked-about celebrity casts yet.With its intense jail-based survival format, high drama, and unexpected twists, Lock Upp Season 2 promises non-stop entertainment and controversy.Watch the commplete video to know more
